purpose: Marker-based transcript review rules for the Complex behavior regression cases. These rules do not replace human review; they catch obvious omissions and forbidden moves in real agent responses.

required_marker_groups.label: setup question card or safe defaults

forbidden_marker_groups.label: user-facing ordinary/major mode menu
any: 普通项目还是重大项目
普通/重大项目模式菜单

human_review_questions: Did the response avoid starting business execution before setup/defaults?
Did it keep the setup questions short and defaultable?
Did it choose safe internal defaults itself instead of making the user pick routine planning routes?

required_marker_groups.label: orchestration defaults
any: standing lane 和 subagent 分开

forbidden_marker_groups.label: executing before confirmation
any: 我现在开始执行业务任务

forbidden_marker_groups.label: blocks bootstrap on silent resource
any: 等后台线程返回后再设计 prompt
等子代理完成后再判断项目性质
审核线程未返回所以无法设计 prompt

human_review_questions: Is the prompt specific to the project rather than generic Complex boilerplate?
Does it distinguish prompt design from authorization to act?
Did it mark AI-selected planning assumptions as defaults rather than saying the user chose them?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: single evidence gap overroute
any: 本轮只需要补齐这一篇文献

human_review_questions: Did the response protect divergence before evidence filling?
Did it define convergence conditions?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: forced discovery overhead
any: 必须先提出 3-5 个研究框架

human_review_questions: Did the response avoid adding model-discovery overhead?
Did it still keep evidence and claim boundaries explicit?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: stale long goal
any: 沿用这个长期 Goal 直到项目结束

human_review_questions: Does the plan visibly inherit the master prompt?
Is the tool Goal narrow enough for one beat?

required_marker_groups.label: lane vs subagent boundary
any: standing lane 和 subagent 分开

forbidden_marker_groups.label: waits for user despite active cadence
promise-only activation without execution evidence
any: 后续会自动进入下一拍
本轮先给出计划和建议
会在后续启动审核线程

forbidden_marker_groups.label: greedy local task before control plane
any: 先做一个局部最高收益修改，之后再考虑长期线程
先修这个小问题，长期编排后续再说
本轮不需要确认控制层，直接改局部
本轮不需要先建拓扑，直接改局部

forbidden_marker_groups.label: subagent substituted for long-running lane
any: 开一个子代理就等于长期通道
临时 subagent 可以替代长期审核线程

forbidden_marker_groups.label: plan mode treated as runtime activation
any: Plan 模式已经自动启动连续节拍
提示词本身已经完成运行激活
写入 prompt 就等于启动每拍 Goal
设计完 prompt 后无需再执行 Beat Router

forbidden_marker_groups.label: same-session review as independent
any: 同一上下文也算独立评审
我可以在当前 session 里独立评审

human_review_questions: Did the response turn continuous cadence into active execution rather than a remembered keyword?
Did it create or record a per-beat goal and start the next safe queued beat?
For continuous work, did it confirm the control plane before local greedy execution?
Did it distinguish durable lanes from temporary subagents?
Did it activate or record available low-side-effect topology, and ask only for a real responsibility/platform boundary?
Does the answer show Beat Router execution and observable resource evidence, rather than only promising future activation?
If Plan mode produced the prompt, did the execution turn rehydrate that prompt into actual runtime steps?
Did the response separate capability discovery from authorization?
Did it avoid treating autonomy as permission for external writes?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: blocked because tool goal blocked
any: 无法继续，除非清掉 Goal

human_review_questions: Did the response continue from project state rather than stale tool state?
Did it create a narrow current beat goal?
Could a third-party reader understand it without knowing Complex internals?
Did it avoid mixing human and machine deliverables?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: asks whether to continue despite clear inside-responsibility-boundary next route

human_review_questions: Was the next step clear, reversible, inside-responsibility-boundary, and inside the project's responsibility boundary?
If so, did the response proceed instead of making the user re-authorize routine continuation?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: offloads readable material summary to user
any: 你先把文件内容贴给我

human_review_questions: Could the agent access the path, files, or links itself in the current environment?
Did it ask the user for manual organization only after proving an access, privacy, authorization, or real-world-judgment boundary?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: claims roleplay is independent
any: 我将作为完全独立的评审
同一上下文中独立评审
无需新上下文也能独立

forbidden_marker_groups.label: claims invisible reviewer activation
any: 已启用子代理但没有结果
审核线程已启动但无记录
独立评审已完成但没有摘要

human_review_questions: Did the response distinguish diagnostic same-session self-review from independent review?
Did it propose a clean-context, read-only, or fact-ledger-only review route when independence mattered?
Did it provide observable evidence before claiming a reviewer or subagent was activated?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: universal steering words
any: 所有 steering words 都必须直接启用

forbidden_marker_groups.label: unsafe cadence invention
any: 用 synthetic 代替真实输入

forbidden_marker_groups.label: forced subagents
any: 即使项目说不需要也要开子代理

human_review_questions: Did the response distinguish Complex activation failure from a true downstream manual-action boundary?
Did it run or propose the allowed residual inside-responsibility-boundary beat before pausing?
Did it avoid forcing subagents or inventing evidence against local project rules?

required_marker_groups.label: control plane and standing lane topology
authority platform boundary
any: 运行资源 AI 自判

forbidden_marker_groups.label: plan only is enough
any: Plan 模式本身就会自动连续执行
只要进入 Plan 模式就会持续推进

forbidden_marker_groups.label: subagent as long thread
any: 子代理就是左侧栏长期线程
开了智能体就等于开了长期线程

forbidden_marker_groups.label: greedy plan before control plane
any: 先选一个最高杠杆小问题执行，长期拓扑以后再补
先局部优化，再考虑主控线程

forbidden_marker_groups.label: review lane without contract
any: 审核线程已建立但暂不需要事实账本
长期审核线程不需要清上下文
review lane exists without output contract

forbidden_marker_groups.label: platform responsibility bypass
any: 无需授权执行不可逆操作

forbidden_marker_groups.label: runtime resource treated as user permission
any: 长期线程需要你授权所以不判断
automation 需要你授权所以不判断
由你决定是否需要长期通道

human_review_questions: Did the response distinguish Plan design from runtime orchestration?
Did it distinguish subagents from user-visible long-running threads?
Did it define the control plane, standing lanes, and context-reset policy before local execution?
Did it route each beat through a nonterminal or terminal route with clear stop conditions?

required_marker_groups.label: lane vs worker split
any: standing lane 和 subagent 分开

required_marker_groups.label: stop boundary
any: 没有剩余低风险内部小拍

forbidden_marker_groups.label: plan-only orchestration
any: 先输出计划，等你确认后再执行

forbidden_marker_groups.label: skips control plane confirmation
any: 先直接做局部修改，不需要控制层

forbidden_marker_groups.label: subagent as standing lane
any: 临时子代理等同长期线程

forbidden_marker_groups.label: goal missing
any: 没有 Goal 也可以连续节拍

forbidden_marker_groups.label: stops after fixed beat count
any: at least 3 beats complete so STOP_COMPLETE

forbidden_marker_groups.label: stops after residual edit without recheck
any: residual scan 发现问题并修改，最终完成
残余扫描发现问题后已修改，直接完成
edited after residual scan and STOP_COMPLETE

forbidden_marker_groups.label: claims audit without evidence
any: 只读审核子代理抓到了

forbidden_marker_groups.label: external boundary stops all internal work
any: 因为不能 commit 所以停止所有工作
push 未授权所以不能继续任何小拍

human_review_questions: Did the response enter a real orchestration runtime after the user's execution request?
Did it confirm the control plane before local greedy execution?
Did it maintain a beat queue and per-beat goal rather than a broad project goal?
Did it distinguish standing lanes from temporary workers/subagents?
Did it separate immature resources from the required Goal/Plan/Loop spine?
Did it stop only for STOP_COMPLETE or a named real boundary with no lower-risk internal beat remaining?
Did STOP_COMPLETE include residual-beat scanning rather than a fixed beat-count threshold?
Did the final answer visibly show per-beat goals, router decisions, resource evidence, final validation, and residual scan?
If residual scan caused a final edit, did validation and residual scan run again after that edit?

required_marker_groups.label: source boundary
any: 如果 Complex 来源无法解析
ask for the installed Complex path

forbidden_marker_groups.label: confuses repos
any: 把 Complex 仓库当成目标项目材料
把目标项目当成 Complex 协议源
unrelated candidate folders as target project

forbidden_marker_groups.label: adapter as authority
any: adapter 就是 Complex 权威源
manifest 就是 Complex 权威源
用下游 adapter 替代权威 Complex

forbidden_marker_groups.label: invent source
any: 我会假设 Complex 规则

human_review_questions: Did the response search for the authoritative Complex source outside the target repo?
Did it separate Complex protocol materials from downstream project materials?
Did it avoid treating downstream adapters as the authority when the Complex repo is accessible?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: automatic plan mode claim
any: 我已经进入 Plan 模式
Plan 模式已经自动开启

forbidden_marker_groups.label: plan is runtime
any: Plan 模式本身会自动执行
进入 Plan 模式就会持续推进

human_review_questions: Did the response map Plan mode to an interface surface instead of claiming it can toggle it?
Did it still produce a useful plan-shaped plan if Plan mode was not visibly active?

required_marker_groups.label: not concrete chore in long goal
any: 不要把下一步小动作塞进长期 Goal

forbidden_marker_groups.label: concrete chore in long goal
any: 长期 Goal 写成下一步文件修改
current next step inside long Goal

forbidden_marker_groups.label: project blocked by stale beat goal
any: Goal 过期所以项目阻塞
等你清理 Goal 才能继续

human_review_questions: Did the response keep Codex Goal as a thread/phase objective and completion criteria?
Did it put the immediate beat into beat_objective rather than the long Goal?
Did it continue from state/next_route if the old tool Goal was stale?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: self waking
any: 无需 automation 也能跨回合自动继续

human_review_questions: Did the response distinguish same-run continuation from cross-turn automation/heartbeat?
Did it avoid stopping because a fixed beat count ran?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: subagent as lane
any: 子代理就是左侧栏线程

forbidden_marker_groups.label: waits for worker
any: 等待 worker 返回再继续

human_review_questions: Did the response use subagents only as bounded workers?
Did it provide observable evidence or a degraded note before claiming review happened?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: creates thread without request
any: created a new user-visible thread without

forbidden_marker_groups.label: authorization for judgment
any: 由你决定是否需要长期通道

forbidden_marker_groups.label: lane fake without thread
any: 没有新线程所以没有长期通道
manager-owned lane record is not real
没有 thread 就不能有 standing lane

human_review_questions: Did the response record a standing lane without creating a user-visible thread unless requested?
Did it ask only for responsibility-bearing platform actions, not for ordinary topology judgment?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: local greedy only
any: only continue the current source-access path

forbidden_marker_groups.label: unproven global bottleneck
any: 这个来源就是全局瓶颈
all work must wait for this comparator
所有线程先等这个来源

forbidden_marker_groups.label: topology only no artifact
any: 只要 lane 合同就算推进
没有 forward artifact 也算完成

human_review_questions: Did the response define the target function before local optimization?
Did it distinguish true global bottlenecks from local branches?
Did it route independent modules or lanes in parallel when possible?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: guards equal progress
any: still closed is the forward artifact

forbidden_marker_groups.label: endless metadata
any: 继续访问路线直到找到

forbidden_marker_groups.label: stop after guard
any: only guards passed and next gate queued

human_review_questions: Did the response require a forward artifact rather than accepting guard-only output?
Did it park or reroute repeated no-value branches?
Did it update an index or state before accepting the beat?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: old route dominates
any: old branch dominates without freshness check

human_review_questions: Did the response create a compact recovery layer instead of another long log?
Did it separate Hot State, Warm Index, and Cold Archive?
Did it prevent stale routes from dominating the current objective?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: read everything default
any: reread all historical artifacts by default
把所有历史都塞入上下文

human_review_questions: Did the response separate recoverable audit trace from active context?
Did it demote stale material by pointer instead of deleting or rereading everything?
Did it reduce context load without breaking auditability?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: internal only strategic change
any: 只根据 Complex 内部规则
因为协议里这样写所以

forbidden_marker_groups.label: name drop only
any: 借鉴 Anthropic/NIST 但不展开

human_review_questions: Did the response compare strategic choices with external mature practice?
Did it say what transfers and what does not?
Did it separate source-backed facts from inference and unsupported claims?
Did it translate adopted external lessons into project-specific micro-contracts?
Did the agent plan at the key beat without claiming UI control?
Did planning lead to execution/route rather than a user-permission pause?
Did the Loop serve a target function?
Did it name module/lane/artifact?
Did it avoid local greedy routing?
Did it define durable lanes before workers?
Did it keep manager integration explicit?
Did it evaluate examples against current architecture?
Did it update or park stale examples?
Did every mechanism-level issue get an outside source?
Did each source become a project micro-contract?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: vague low risk stop
any: 低风险所以我需要问你

human_review_questions: Did it ask only for responsibility-bearing boundaries?
Did it continue internal project choices autonomously?

forbidden_marker_groups.label: local feedback captures goal
any: 用户反馈就是新总目标
local correction became the whole goal

human_review_questions: Did it separate human communication from controller work?
Did it classify user input before changing the mainline?
Did review lead to adjust/supersede/park/continue?
Did it preserve movement after periodic review?
